description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a distinctive design, featuring a combination of smooth, light brown armrests and base, and soft, medium-gray seat and back cushions. The armrests are dramatically curved and flare outward, creating a bold visual statement and providing ample support on both sides. The backrest is gently contoured with a dual-peak silhouette, seamlessly integrated with the seat cushions, which are divided into two equal sections. The sofa sits on four small, dark legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid, smooth fabric or synthetic leather, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A stylish two-seater sofa with curved brown armrests and a contoured gray cushion set, featuring a modern, low-profile design and smooth upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual-peak backrest, two gray seat cushions, and wide, outward-curving brown armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rolled brown armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, contoured gray backrest and the symmetrical brown armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with the brown armrest dominating the profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, both seamlessly integrated and divided at the center.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high, dramatically curved and flared outward, thickly padded, with a smooth brown finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four small, dark legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely block or stub style, possibly made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, dual-peak contoured backrest, continuous and smoothly integrated with the seat, no tufting or segmentation beyond the central divide.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
